name: ui-token-skill
description: Extracts all visual design tokens (colors, typography, font-size, font-weight, line-height, spacing, radius, shadow, border, grid, container, breakpoints, motion) from a design source (Figma / image / hand-written tokens), then generates a single CSS override file that re-skins an existing component library (Element Plus / Ant Design / Naive UI / shadcn / MUI / Chakra / Vuetify). Preserves all interaction behavior. Works on every major AI coding agent via npx skills install.
author: mimi0132
